latestHandover: Session 8 complete (2026-03-20). Live Kubernetes cluster performance audit added 8 new findings (DR-52–DR-59, Phase 9). P0 cluster-down conditions: tigera-operator stuck Pending due to non-existent node selector receptor-ctrl-01 (DR-52), cert-manager-cainjector crash-looping 968+ times blocking TLS issuance due to NetworkPolicy + resource limits (DR-53, DR-56), both Supabase environments offline 2d22h due to missing VSO-synced secret keys (DR-54). P1: Loki volume stuck (DR-55). P2: node taints (DR-57), resource limits (DR-58), Prometheus retention (DR-59). Remaining open tasks: DR-51-T1 (DinD injection), DR-52-T1 through DR-59-T1 (K8s fixes). Next agent: implement DR-52 first (tigera-operator node selector patch in receptor-infra), then DR-53 (NetworkPolicy egress for cert-manager), then DR-54 (VSO re-sync for Supabase secrets).

sessionHistory.summary: Live k8s cluster performance audit. Added DR-52–DR-59 (8 new Infrastructure findings, Phase 9). No code changes this session — audit document update only.
Infrastructure recovery: Fixed MTU (1370) and NetworkPolicy egress for arc-runners. Fixed helmfile.yaml syntax. Restored receptor-infra runner set. Identified DinD injection blocker.

Session 1: all supabase-receptor workflow fixes implemented. 7 files changed: smoke-test/action.yml (DR-02/16/30), staging-smoke.yml (DR-17/26), prod-deploy.yml (DR-03/04), deploy-function.yml (DR-06/07/38/39/40/41), key-rotation-reminder.yml (DR-08/42/43/44), ci.yml (DR-01), new .github/scripts/post-rotation-reminder.py (DR-42 helper).
JSON reconciliation (34 tasks); supabase-receptor Phase 5; frontend carry-overs; DR-24 un-deferred; DR-27 production gate
Phase 4: website-frontend CI/deploy/rollback, Dockerfiles for all frontends, rollback.yml x4 backends, 3 frontend deploy.yml. Bonus: preference-frontend codegen env fix.
